footer.tagline: Premium multi-service business group delivering construction, trading, healthcare, and investment advisory solutions.

home.slide_0_desc: VIP Group unites infrastructure, trading, healthcare, and investment planning under one trusted ecosystem.
home.slide_1_desc: From large-scale civil works to strategic materials and mobility logistics, we deliver with precision.
home.slide_2_desc: Specialized physiotherapy and wealth planning designed for long-term confidence and better living.
home.divisions_subtitle: VIP Group combines engineering execution, trading strength, healthcare care, and investment planning under one trusted ecosystem.
home.about_card_0_desc: Civil construction, layouts/plans, structural and MEP support, and value-added services in one group.
home.about_card_1_desc: Quality assurance with planned execution, consistent improvement, and timely delivery standards.
home.about_card_2_desc: Trusted by clients through customized solutions, transparent dealings, and long-term support.
home.about_us_body: Established in 2019 at Kattumannarkoil, VIP Group delivers civil construction services including roads, highways, industrial roads, interiors, exteriors, rainwater harvesting, and fabrication support. Our mission is to maintain high standards, honest dealings, and value-driven project execution.
home.about_us_stat_0: 26 to 50 team members delivering multi-domain projects.
home.about_us_stat_1: Managed by experienced leadership under Mr. Ranjith Kumar.
home.about_us_stat_2: Focused on quality, commitment, and timely execution.
home.why_point_0: Trusted multi-division organization with domain expertise.
home.why_point_1: Strong quality standards and transparent execution process.
home.why_point_2: Reliable service continuity from planning to delivery.
home.cta_section_title: Build Your Next Success With VIP Group
home.cta_section_body: Connect with our team for infrastructure contracts, material supply, physiotherapy care, or investment planning. We help you move faster with confidence.

infra_projects.name: VENI Infra Projects Pvt Ltd
infra_projects.description: End-to-end infrastructure execution for residential, industrial, and public works.

infra.hero_subtitle: Delivering high-quality construction, infrastructure, and consultancy services with precision and trust.
infra.about_p1: VENI Infra Projects Pvt Ltd is the core construction division of VIP Group, handling construction and contracts, government projects, infrastructure works, and specialized civil execution with quality and accountability.
infra.about_p2: We also support interior works, solid blocks and paver blocks, as well as transportation of M Sand, P Sand, Gravel, and Blue Metal for efficient project supply.
infra.about_p3: Established in 2019, our team is guided by Mr. Ranjith Kumar and committed to quality assurance, timely execution, and client-focused customized solutions.
infra.owner_bio: Leads infrastructure delivery with a strong focus on quality construction, safety standards, and on-time completion across public and private projects.
infra.services_note: We follow a quality-first execution model: complete planning and design, compliant materials sourcing, safety-focused site control, and on-time project handover.

services.gov_desc: Civil works under public infrastructure tenders
services.blocks_desc: Strong and compliant block manufacturing support
services.transport_desc: M Sand, P Sand, Gravel, Blue Metal, JCB and Tipper rental

infra.cert_subtitle: We maintain essential legal, regulatory, and quality credentials for safe and compliant project delivery.

why_items.title: Experienced Engineers
why_items.desc: Skilled team with years of civil engineering expertise.

why_items.title: Quality Construction
why_items.desc: We use high-grade materials and strict quality control systems.

infra.contact_intro: Get in touch with us for construction, consultancy, and infrastructure services. Our team will respond quickly.
infra.contact_address: 65, VIP Building, New West St, Udaiyargudi, Kattumannarkoil, Tamil Nadu

trading.hero_subtitle: Reliable cement and material supply chain with transport and equipment support for fast project execution.
trading.about_body: We focus on dependable procurement and supply operations for builders, contractors, and infrastructure teams. From branded cement to blocks and pavers, we ensure quality stock movement with timely delivery.
trading.transport_body: Dedicated transport support for cement, blocks, and construction materials with flexible dispatch windows and route reliability.
trading.why_2: Strong vendor relationships and pricing support
trading.why_3: Quick response for urgent site demand
trading.contact_intro: Reach us for product rates, supply schedules, and transport support.
trading.partner_body: Our trading division supports contractors and project owners with dependable inventory, responsive dispatch, and transparent procurement support.

physio.about_p1: VIP Physiotherapy Life offers modern rehabilitation and pain management with a calm, medical-style environment. Our goal is to restore mobility, comfort, and confidence in daily life.
physio.about_p2: Led by Dr. M.K. Sruthika (MPT Neuro, MIAP), each plan is tailored based on diagnosis, tolerance, and progress.
process_steps: Home exercise guidance and follow-up review
testimonials: I recovered faster after a knee injury with structured sessions.
Professional approach and clear progress guidance every week.
Excellent care and personalized treatment for chronic back pain.
physio.contact_subtitle: Veni Physiotherapy Life | Dr. M.K. Sruthika
physio.contact_address: No.65 VIP Building, Puthumela Street, Udaiyarkudi, Kattumannarkoil - 608301
physio.doctor_bio: Provides evidence-based physiotherapy programs for pain relief, mobility restoration, and long-term functional wellness.

investment.about_credentials: Ln. K. Maheshkumar | LIC Advisor, MDRT, Galaxy Club Member
investment.about_body: Specialized in goal-driven insurance and financial planning for secure long-term growth with trusted, relationship-based advisory.
investment.benefit_0: Tailored investment roadmap based on your goals
investment.why_body: We provide trusted, transparent, and personalized financial advice with a long-term relationship approach.
